title: Sour Dense Russian Pear Biryani
description: A sour and dense Russian dish featuring pears and bonito shave, suitable for a Buddhist temple gathering, this biryani is an energizing meal option.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add basmati rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, until rice is cooked and water is absorbed.
In a separate pan, combine lemon juice, bonito flakes, salt, and black pepper, and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is well combined and heated through.
Fluff cooked rice with a fork and stir in the lemon juice mixture and diced pears.
Serve hot, garnished with additional bonito flakes if desired.
